docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-18-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 CONTINUED PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO DEC-03-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THIS CASE TO BE HEARD CONCURRENTLY WITH CSM-870269 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON FEB 04, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS REJECTION TO REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL TO MADHUSUDHAN PUJARA RETURN TO SENDER -NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF ARTHI RABBANE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MADHUPA INC IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS THAT PROOF OF SERVICE IS SOUND. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RABBANE, ARTHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MADHUPA INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,250.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
